metadata.name: Onboard a New Customer and Set Credit Limit

description: A salesperson has signed a new customer. The credit team needs to set them up in the system and establish an initial credit limit.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new customer information, including their legal name and address.
Run a credit report on the new customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the customer's credit score.

nodes.task_description: Based on the credit score and company policy, determine an appropriate initial credit limit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets an initial credit limit of $25,000.

nodes.task_description: Create the new customer master record in the ERP system with the assigned credit limit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new customer record.
